dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Sometimes we feel nervous before a test, a game, or even a short talk with someone.
dialogue.chinese: 有时候，我们在考试前、比赛前，甚至和别人简短交谈时都会感到紧张。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: It is a perfectly normal feeling, and everyone feels this way from time to time.
dialogue.chinese: 这是一种完全正常的感受，每个人都会时不时地经历它。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: When that happens, I want to share a simple but very helpful tip with you today.
dialogue.chinese: 当那种情况发生时，我想今天和你分享一个简单但非常有帮助的小技巧。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: First, try slow breathing. Close your eyes gently and breathe in slowly through your nose.
dialogue.chinese: 首先，尝试慢呼吸。轻轻地闭上眼睛，然后慢慢地通过鼻子吸气。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Then breathe out slowly through your mouth, as if you are blowing out a small candle.
dialogue.chinese: 然后慢慢用嘴呼气，就像在吹灭一支小蜡烛。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: This helps your body relax. Your heart beats more slowly, and your mind feels much clearer.
dialogue.chinese: 这会帮助身体放松，让心跳慢下来，头脑也变得更加清晰。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Next, do one small action that feels very easy and comfortable for you right now.
dialogue.chinese: 接下来，做一个你觉得现在非常容易且舒适的小动作。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: It could be standing up, stretching your arms, or simply smiling at yourself in the mirror.
dialogue.chinese: 可以是站起来、伸展手臂，或者只是对着镜子里的自己微笑。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: That little movement tells your brain that you are safe, strong, and ready to move forward.
dialogue.chinese: 这个小动作会告诉大脑：你很安全、很坚强，也准备好继续向前。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: You can try this before a test, a game, or any moment when you feel really worried.
dialogue.chinese: 你可以在考试前、比赛前，或在任何你感到真正担心的时刻尝试这个方法。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: With practice, this will soon start to feel more natural and easier.
dialogue.chinese: 多练习几次，这个方法很快就会变得更自然、更容易。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Remember, feeling nervous does not mean something is wrong with you or that you are weak at all.
dialogue.chinese: 记住，感到紧张并不意味着你有什么问题，也绝不代表你软弱。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Slow breathing and one small action together can really make a big difference in how you feel.
dialogue.chinese: 慢呼吸和一个小动作结合在一起，真的可以对你的感觉产生很大的不同。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: You are brave and capable, and you can handle it one breath at a time.
dialogue.chinese: 你很勇敢，也很有能力，可以一次呼吸、一步一步地面对它。
